title: Dinh Bo Linh Unifies the Nation
summary: Dinh Bo Linh, the hero from the reed flag game, defeated the 12 warlords, unified the country, and ascended the throne as Emperor, founding the Dinh Dynasty.

slides.text: As a child, Dinh Bo Linh often played with buffaloherd friends using reed flowers as flags, practicing mock battles in the Hoa Lu region.
slides.imagePrompt: A group of children playing in a field, boy Dinh Bo Linh holding a reed flower flag, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Growing up, he was a talented strategist who eventually defeated the 12 warlords dividing the country.
slides.imagePrompt: General Dinh Bo Linh leading his army to unify divided lands, landscape of ancient Vietnam, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: In 968, he unified the land and ascended the throne as Emperor, taking the title Dinh Tien Hoang.
slides.imagePrompt: Dinh Bo Linh's coronation ceremony as Emperor, royal guards, Hoa Lu city, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: He named the country Dai Co Viet and established the capital in Hoa Lu, opening a new era of independence and strength.
slides.imagePrompt: Ancient city of Hoa Lu with mountains and palaces, peaceful Dai Co Viet kingdom, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: What did Dinh Bo Linh use as flags while practicing mock battles with his friends?
What did he name our country when he ascended the throne?
